review: Y, D, W, FE, and inference choices are documented clearly.
LOWESS and ML evidence are correctly treated as diagnostics, not causal evidence.
Explains functional-form limits while preserving OLS/FE/TWFE as necessary baselines.
Shows stable DML direction for level/log treatments and weak evidence for growth treatment.
Selects log_real_min_wage as main DML treatment, real_min_wage as robustness, and min_wage_growth as exploratory.
Compares OLS/FE/TWFE and DML by role; leaves CRF blank because it has not been implemented.
